channel.title: ParisAI Labs — Field notes
channel.description: Methodology posts on AI email intelligence, prospect scoring, deliverability, and AWS Bedrock infra.

item.title: Why LLM-personalized email beats templates by 4×
item.description: A 3.6% reply rate vs the industry's typical 0.9%, and what specifically about per-prospect generation drives the gap.
item.author: pierre@parisai.click (Pierre Richard)

item.title: Intent scoring on Shopify stores — 40 signals that actually predict reply
item.description: From product catalog depth to checkout pixel presence, the signals we feed our scoring model and which ones turned out to be noise.
item.author: pierre@parisai.click (Pierre Richard)

item.title: AWS Bedrock vs self-hosted inference — the cost math at sub-1M tokens/day
item.description: Llama-3-70B on g5.12xlarge vs Bedrock pay-per-use. Why managed inference wins until you hit a very specific scale.
item.author: pierre@parisai.click (Pierre Richard)

item.title: Email deliverability in 2025 — what changed, what still works
item.description: Google's bulk-sender rules, Microsoft's tenant scoring shifts, and the warmup pattern we use to keep new sending domains above 99% inbox placement.
item.author: pierre@parisai.click (Pierre Richard)
